CustomField.description: Account__r.BillingCountry (CounselingRecord_CounselorRecord_AddressPart3_Country) - must use SBA-defined list of countries to populate this field - literal values, not codes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Account__r.BillingCountry (CounselingRecord_CounselorRecord_AddressPart3_Country) - must use SBA-defined list of countries to populate this field - literal values, not codes.
CustomField.label: Country_AddressPart3
